resources.string: WANT TO WIN 386301 XRP - PRESS AND START PLAYING!
Guess the color — double your bet

The rules of this game are very simple.

You just have to choose the number you want to bet on. (from - 1 to - 36)

In case of winning, the bet will be increased by 36 times.

If the bet is lost, it goes to the savings fund - LOTTO.

Absolutely any user can win a LOTTO, regardless of what and how much he bet - if the LOTTO sector falls out. And you can also win a mini LOTTO - it is one tenth of the LOTTO.

The minimum bet is 0.1 XRP, the maximum is 100 XRP.

The rules of this game are very simple. You just have to choose the number you want to bet on. (from - 1 to - 36) In case of winning, the bet will be increased by 36 times. If the bet is lost, it goes to the savings fund - lotto. Absolutely any user can win a lotto, regardless of what and how much he bet - if the lotto sector falls out. And you can also win a mini lotto - it is one tenth of the lotto.\n\nThe minimum bet is 0.1 XRP, the maximum is 100 XRP.

The rules of this game are very simple.

You place a bet and indicate which color.

If the color is guessed - your bet will be doubled.

If the bet is lost, it goes to the savings fund - LOTTO.

Absolutely any user can win a LOTTO, regardless of what and how much he bet - if the LOTTO sector falls out. And you can also win a mini LOTTO - it is one tenth of the LOTTO.

The minimum bet is 0.1 XRP, the maximum is 100 XRP.

The rules of this game are very simple. You place a bet and indicate which color. If the color is guessed - your bet will be doubled. If the bet is lost, it goes to the savings fund - lotto. Absolutely any user can win a lotto, regardless of what and how much he bet - if the lotto sector falls out. And you can also win a mini lotto - it is one tenth of the lotto.\n\nThe minimum bet is 0.1 XRP, the maximum is 100 XRP.
IF YOU HAVE A REFERRAL CODE - BE SURE TO ENTER IT - IT WILL GIVE YOU EXTRA LIVES ON YOUR BETS AND PARTICIPATION IN THE DAILY PRIZE DRAW
CURRENTLY THE GAME IS UNDER DEVELOPMENT. WE WANT TO IMPLEMENT THE CLASSIC ROULETTE GAME WITH THE MAXIMUM QUALITY.
CONGRATULATIONS! YOUR BET WON THE LOTTO! THE WIN IS %s XRP — PLAY AND KEEP WINNING!
Referral recovery request sent — please wait for the server response
CONGRATULATIONS! YOUR BET WON! THE WIN IS %s XRP — PLAY AND KEEP WINNING!
Referral request sent — please wait for the server response
GO TO THE DARK SIDE - FIND THE SECRET BUTTON!
YOUR BET IS LOST — TRY AGAIN AND LUCK WILL COME!
BE SURE TO SAVE THE SEED AND DO NOT GIVE IT TO ANYONE
SET A PASSWORD TO ENTER THE APPLICATION
Error: check your seed phrase and try again
Destination tag value is too large
YOUR ACCOUNT IS NOT ENOUGH TO SEND
BECOME A REFERRAL AND START EARNING
Error: check your seed phrase and try again.
DON\'T WORRY — KEEP PLAYING AND LUCK WILL COME!
Biometrics not set up on this device
Incorrect seed phrase. Please try again.
Use fingerprint or Face ID to unlock the wallet instead of a password
Real XRP will be used for bets.
Virtual balance will be used. No real XRP involved.
• We are not an official wallet of XRP or Ripple.
• Your keys are stored only on your device and are not transmitted anywhere.
• By starting to use the application, you confirm that you are over 18 years old.
• According to XRP network rules, activating a new wallet costs - 10 XRP.
• Our application embodies a future where games and wallets are merged.
• Forget about transfers, balance top-ups, and registration – we don\'t need that.
• Now your funds are completely secure.
• Our vision - one wallet recovery phrase to rule them all.
• After wallet recovery, you are immediately ready to play.
• Our wallet is unrestricted, and its usage is at your discretion.
• Active users receive rewards and participate in SUPER LOTTO.
• Any user can become a referral.
• Loyal and democratic, it takes into account user interests.
• We do not track your location or classify users.
• Development, increasing functionality, and expanding gaming opportunities.
• All gaming actions are publicly available and permanently recorded in the XRP registry.
• Make games available worldwide at any place and time.
• Ensure equal and fair conditions for all users, as well as provide an opportunity for self-realization with us.
• Create a people\'s product where each user can participate in its further development, determining the direction of movement, and we will implement it.

• Our project has good security and recovery system, but internet connection itself does not guarantee one hundred percent operability. Therefore, we recommend starting the game with the lowest difficulty levels and gradually increasing them. In case of problems, postpone the game for a while – the system will process the failures and provide you with an answer.
Good luck and thank you for choosing our application!
• Users can become referrals by investing 66 XRP and start inviting new users under their referral.
• The number of referral slots is limited.
• The number of invited users under a referral is unlimited.
• In case of losing the referral code, it can be recovered for 13 XRP.
Benefits for Referrals and Their Partners:
• Referrals, as well as their invited users actively participating in the application, can participate in the daily LOTTO draw.

• Each user who joins under a referral receives an extra life in each game. This allows automatically replaying lost games, providing the opportunity to try again to win, while won games do not require replaying.
• Referrals automatically receive a percentage of active users.
• Users without referrals or subscription to a referral are deprived of the above-mentioned benefits. They do not have an extra life and do not participate in the daily LOTTO.
• Expansion of benefits for referrals and their subscribers in the future.
• We are not an official XRP or Ripple wallet.
• Your keys are stored only on your device and never shared.
• By using this app, you confirm you are 18 years of age or older.
• Activating a new XRP wallet requires a one-time reserve of 10 XRP — this is a network rule, not our fee.
• Become a referral by investing 66 XRP and start earning from your network.
• Lost your referral code? You can recover it for 13 XRP.
• Referrals who place at least one bet per day are entered into the evening prize draw.
• Users with a referral code get an extra life — one automatic replay on any lost bet.
• Over 90% of all lost bets are redistributed daily among that day\'s active players.
• Our application is the embodiment of our vision of the future - where games and the wallet are one.
• You no longer need to transfer your money somewhere, top up your balance, register - remember passwords and keys.
• We do not store or send your keys anywhere.
• You will no longer risk funds - transferring them somewhere.
• No one can block you or take away your money.
• In our vision of future games, all these moments should be replaced by just one recovery phrase from your wallet.
• Your key to your wallet is also the key to everything.
• As soon as you have restored your wallet, you are immediately ready to play, nothing else is needed.
• You can use our wallet without any restrictions - it is not necessary to play, everything is only according to your desire.
• For active users, we provide rewards. Any of our users playing our games can win our SUPER LOTTO and more.
• Any user can become our referral and earn 5% of the attracted funds, as well as from the prize pool.
• The whole system works fully automatically.
• The system is as loyal and democratic as possible, and takes into account the interests of the user as much as possible.
• Part of the system code is already in the public domain.
• Further, after we finish everything and bring it to perfection, as well as take into account and implement your wishes, we will put all the code in the public domain.
• We strive for the most fair and honest conditions for everyone.
• We do not track your location and other data.
• We do not divide our users into classes.
• All actions performed in our games are fully accounted for and permanently recorded in the XRP ledger.
• We make the system as automatic and secure as possible, as well as decentralized.
• And we do not have endpoints of access to our servers, therefore it is impossible to attack them, as well as to find them - all communication with the server goes through the blockchain.
• We plan to develop further, increase functionality and expand the range of gaming options.

• Our main goal is to make games available to everyone and anywhere in the world at any time you wish. And also so that everyone has the same and fair conditions both in the game and in the opportunity to earn in our system.
• Good luck and thank you for your trust in choosing our application.
Your transaction history will appear here
Classic roulette powered by XRP Ledger — maximum fairness through blockchain transparency.
We\'ll notify you when Roulette launches!
ENTER AMOUNT, THEN TAP A CELL TO PLACE A BET
I saved the phrase and I\'m ready to continue
Guess the number and place a bet
Funded! Check balance in a few seconds.
